/usr/bin/c++ -Ofast -lrt -std=c++11 -DHAVE_CXX0X -march=native -fpic -w -fopenmp -ftree-vectorize -ftree-vectorizer-verbose=0 -g CMakeFiles/indexing_construction.dir/examples/cpp/index_construction.cpp.o -o indexing_construction  libhnswlib.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-redhat-linux/8/libgomp.so /usr/lib64/libpthread.so
